title: Side-by-side code editor and pseudo viewer with file existence checking
purpose: Displays a code editor alongside a pseudo viewer in a split pane layout, dynamically checking for the existence of corresponding .pseudo files and showing appropriate loading or empty states.
module_context: Exports a React component PseudoSideBySideView that accepts source file path and project path props, and a helper function deriveStem for path manipulation. Uses SplitPane for layout and fetchPseudoFile for checking .pseudo file existence.

steps.content: Calculate the relative path from project root to the source file.
Remove the file extension from the relative path.
Return the resulting path without extension as the pseudo stem.
Derive the pseudo stem from the source file path and project path.
Initialize state to track whether the corresponding pseudo file exists.
On component mount or prop changes, check for the existence of the pseudo file.
IF the pseudo file check is in progress, display a loading spinner.
IF the pseudo file does not exist, show an empty state with instructions.
IF the pseudo file exists, render the pseudo viewer with the correct path.
Render the split pane layout with the editor on the left and pseudo viewer on the right.
Set the pseudo file existence state to checking.
IF project path or pseudo stem are missing, mark the pseudo file as not found.
ELSE attempt to fetch the pseudo file from the backend.
IF the fetch succeeds, mark the pseudo file as existing.
IF the fetch fails, mark the pseudo file as not found.
Clean up the effect by setting a cancellation flag when component unmounts.
